notes: SHIP v1.14.314 - RECOVERY (handoff 'HANDOFF-recover-v314.md'): undo the .313 phone-column parity, keep the responsive desktop grid, fix the ghost properly, un-dim the tiles. ONE commit, four changes. (1) REVERTED the .313 parity cap: removed the additive block `body.rd main.main{width:100%;max-width:390px;margin:0 auto}` + its trailing `@media(min-width:640){...}` phone-grid neutralizer. Done as a forward removal of exactly that block (NOT git-revert - the working tree already held the scrim/idle-dark .314 edits + the stamp, so a manual removal avoids a dirty-tree/version-stamp conflict; this is the handoff's own sanctioned fallback). The 6 original desktop breakpoints (L8760 640->3-col/760, L8765 980->4-col/1080, the .278 Command column) were NEVER edited by .313 (it only source-order-overrode them) so removing the override RESTORES the .312 responsive desktop grid verbatim - laptop gets its wide 4-col icon layout back, phone keeps its phone layout. (2) GHOST fixed via Z-INDEX not layout (the .313 cap was the wrong fix): `#pg-cmd .ghosthero` z-index -1 -> 0 (lifts it above the opaque obsidian lens background, where it was hidden on laptop) + NEW `#pg-cmd .lens > *:not(.ghosthero){position:relative;z-index:1}` so every OTHER lens child (clock/llabel/H1/P/shiftpill/cc-magstrip/hverbs verbs) stays ABOVE the ghost - it can never paint over SCAN/LOG/BLOCKER (B-02). Verified in DOM: #cc-ghost.ghosthero IS a direct child of .lens (selector valid) and the verb row sits below the ghost box anyway. Ghost position/size UNCHANGED (right:18px;bottom:100px;width:104px). (3) SCRIM tightened (un-dim tiles, from the earlier HANDOFF-undim-tiles + owner A): shared `.rf-card::after` label scrim `rgba(4,6,10,.94)/.6/transparent 46%` -> `.90/.55/transparent 26%` (one rule = Work + Crash Cart + deploy-tools identical); darkens only the ~26% label band, icons read brighter. (4) N-11 IDLE-DARK REMOVED (owner picked A earlier): the .312 `body.rd #pg-work.wk-hasjob ... .rf-card{opacity:.56;filter:saturate(.72)}` + its .wk-hasjob JS plumbing (var pw + classList add/remove in wk_renderJob) deleted entirely (0 refs left) - Work library cards render FULL-BRIGHT in every state; the job hero stands on its own cyan glass. Gates: whole-file brace balance 11831/11831 (net vs .313 HEAD after removing the parity block + adding the lens-layer rule), all 4 inline <script> vm.Script-compile clean, version triple .313->.314 lockstep, uniform LF, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (all edits body.rd/#pg-cmd-scoped; wk_renderJob redesign-only). Browser-verified localhost at BOTH 1280 (laptop: wide desktop grid restored, ghost visible on Command over the obsidian bg, verbs not covered, tiles bright) and phone-narrow behavior (deterministic - no cap now). DEVICE-VERIFY (John - hard gate, test BOTH phone+laptop): (1) laptop shows the WIDE desktop grid again (not a 390 column); (2) phone shows the phone layout; (3) Command ghost visible on BOTH, not covering any verb; (4) Work + Crash Cart icons brighter, labels readable; (5) ?legacy=1 unchanged. Consolidated batch-verify gate for the .302->.314 stack. NEXT: N-12 phase stepper (backlog).
